results.title: Bank of Baroda Launches Second Phygital Branch in Hyderabad
results.description: Bank of Baroda expands its banking network with the inauguration of its second Phygital Branch in Hyderabad City, offering digital banking and personalized services.

results.title: ‘It felt right to be wrapped in one that raised me first’: Anshula Kapoor wears late mother’s 42-year-old dupatta at wedding
results.description: Anshula Kapoor honoured her late mother Mona Shourie Kapoor on her wedding day by wearing her 42-year-old gold tissue and zardozi dupatta. The emotional heirloom became the centrepiece of her bridal look, with every detail of the outfit designed around it.
